intro: This is a feature-rich rich text editor that supports various formats and features.
tableDesc: Insert and edit tables with row and column operations.
toolbarDesc: Select text to see the bubble toolbar, the top fixed toolbar provides quick access to common operations.
dragHandleDesc: Use the drag handle on the left to reorder, copy, delete or convert block types.
slashCommandDesc: Type `/` to quickly insert headings, lists, code blocks, tables, images, etc.
